_comment: Shirt layer configuration. Each layer has: path, z (z-index), fabric (bool), rotation (deg), zones (null = simple mode, array = polygon-zone mode). Base layers are always included. Select one collar style + button count + one cuff style to build a shirt.

cuffs._note: Cuff zone files are stubs — run zone_picker.py on each cuff PNG to get real polygons, then replace zones:null with the array.
